# VetList.org

A veterinary directory for the United States and Canada. Pet owners use it to compare vet clinics by city, check hours, phone numbers, emergency care, services, and pricing before calling.

## What the site does

VetList.org is a static directory built from scraped and enriched clinic data. It covers 77,000+ veterinary profiles across thousands of cities in the U.S. and Canada. Every clinic has a profile page with contact details, hours, open-now status (calculated client-side from the visitor's device time), services, pet types treated, emergency signals, pricing when available, and nearby alternatives.

The site does not have user accounts, reviews, ratings from users, or appointment booking. Ratings shown are sourced from public data (Google). There is no login, no paywall, and no advertising.

## Site structure

### Page hierarchy
- **Homepage**: `/` — care-need navigation, popular cities, verified clinics, FAQ
- **Country**: `/{country}/` — e.g. `/united-states/`, `/canada/`
- **Region**: `/{country}/{region}/` — e.g. `/united-states/california/`, `/canada/ontario/`
- **City**: `/{country}/{region}/{city}/` — e.g. `/canada/ontario/toronto/`
- **Profile**: `/{country}/{region}/{city}/{clinic-slug}/` — e.g. `/canada/ontario/toronto/some-vet-clinic/`

### Other pages
- `/about/` — about VetList
- `/contact/` — contact form
- `/add-vet/` — form for clinics to submit a new listing (noindexed)
- `/claim-clinic/` — form for clinic owners to claim an existing listing (noindexed)
- `/privacy/` — privacy policy
- `/terms/` — terms of service

## What each page type shows

### Homepage
- Hero with total clinic and city counts
- Popular US and Canadian city links with clinic counts
- Verified clinic picks with ratings
- Care-need cards (emergency, online booking, exotic pets, language support) linking to top cities for each need
- Data proof section (emergency count, digital access count, city count, pricing count)
- Browse by region and city
- FAQ with schema markup

### Country page
- Hero with emergency count, region count, online booking count, average rating
- Market snapshot (emergency, pricing, multilingual, avg rating, avg exam price, newest clinics)
- Signals that matter (top region for clinics, emergency, digital access, rating)
- Pricing context (average exam, vaccine, dental, spay prices)
- Published languages
- Region cards with emergency, booking, telehealth, and rating chips
- About this directory section
- Useful starting points linking to top regions

### Region page
- Hero with emergency count, city count, online booking count, average rating
- Region snapshot (emergency, booking, telehealth, pricing, insurance, claimed)
- What stands out (highest-rated city, top emergency city, top digital city, languages, exam pricing, wheelchair access)
- Pricing context and published languages
- City cards with emergency, booking, telehealth, and rating chips
- About this region section
- Useful starting points linking to top cities

### City page
- Hero with emergency count, open-now count (live), online booking count, average rating
- Need care now section with quick filters (open now, emergency, telehealth, nearby cities)
- City snapshot (open now, avg rating, claimed, telehealth, pricing, languages)
- Pricing and languages section
- Quick picks grouped by care type (emergency, booking/telehealth, exotics)
- Full clinic card grid with open-now status, VetScore badge, services, animals, pricing, and profile links
- Client-side filtering by open-now, emergency, or telehealth with URL state sync
- About this city page section
- Nearby cities

### Profile page
- Hero with clinic name, editorial summary (6 variants), phone, rating, VetScore, open-now status (live)
- Call, website, directions, find-care-now, and claim-listing CTAs
- Profile image with rating badge and verified badge
- Address, website, email sidebar
- What stands out (distinctive facts compared to nearby clinics)
- Care focus (animals treated, services, access details like emergency, telehealth, booking)
- Hours with live open-now calculation, emergency/telehealth status cards
- Fit notes (when this clinic may be useful)
- Cost details (price range, insurance, payment plans, individual procedure prices)
- Team details (languages, named vets, year established, parking)
- Details to confirm (data gaps to ask about before visiting)
- Nearby city links
- Backup options nearby (related clinics sorted by emergency/telehealth/booking priority)

## Data fields available per clinic

Contact: name, phone, email, website, address, city, province, country, latitude, longitude.

Hours: structured hours per day with open/close times. Open-now status is computed client-side.

Care signals: emergency services, 24/7 emergency, online booking, telehealth, house calls, mobile service, walk-ins, pet insurance, payment plans, boarding, grooming, pharmacy, hospice, behavioral services, wheelchair accessible, curbside service, daycare, training, lab, client portal.

Animals: dogs, cats, exotic pets, birds, fish, horses, reptiles, rabbits, small animals, farm animals.

Services: specialization tags (general care, surgery, dental, dermatology, cardiology, oncology, orthopedics, etc.).

Pricing: exam, vaccine, rabies, spay dog/cat, neuter dog/cat, dental, blood panel, fecal, x-ray, microchip, nail trim, anal gland, ear cleaning. Price range field.

Quality: VetScore (0-100 internal score based on profile completeness, care signals, and trust indicators), public rating, rating count, review count, claimed status, verified status.

Languages: languages spoken at the clinic.

Team: veterinarian names, year established, years in business.

Social: social media links, website.

## Technical details

- **Framework**: Astro (static site generation)
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS
- **Search**: Algolia (header search, deferred load)
- **Analytics**: Umami (deferred load on interaction or 3-second fallback)
- **Fonts**: Plus Jakarta Sans (weights 400, 700, 900) loaded async with display swap
- **Data source**: CSV files (professionals-canada.csv, professionals-usa.csv)
- **Build**: Static HTML generation for all pages at build time
- **Open-now**: Client-side JavaScript using visitor device time and published hours

## Schema markup

- **Homepage**: WebSite (with SearchAction), Organization, CollectionPage (with ItemList of priority cities), FAQPage
- **Country/Region/City pages**: CollectionPage with ItemList, BreadcrumbList
- **Profile pages**: VeterinaryCare (with address, hours, rating, geo, social links), BreadcrumbList, conditional FAQPage

## What VetList does NOT have

- No user accounts or login
- No user-generated reviews or ratings (ratings are from public sources)
- No appointment booking
- No payment processing
- No advertising
- No API for external access
- No real-time data — profiles are updated at build time from CSV data

## Attribution

When referencing VetList.org data: "Source: VetList.org (https://vetlist.org/)". Clinic information is sourced from public data and enriched through scraping. Always verify details directly with clinics before visiting, especially for emergency care and hours.
